title: fix(image): remove hardcoded runpod URL fallback for klein
author: fisventurous
pr_body_excerpt:
removes hardcoded runpod proxy url fallback for flux klein model

change
\- throw 500 `HttpError` when `KLEIN_URL` is not configured

gist.headline: Klein config cleanup
gist.blurb: We've swept away some old hardcoded RunPod proxy URLs for the Flux Klein model. Just keeping the hive's configuration clean and predictable!
gist.summary: Removed the hardcoded RunPod proxy URL fallback for the Flux Klein model, now throwing a 500 HttpError if the KLEIN_URL environment variable is missing.
gist.impact: This ensures the image generation API strictly relies on configured environment variables rather than silently falling back to a hardcoded proxy.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) and the Nomnom creature cleaning up the environment. Nomnom is eating an old, dusty 'hardcoded' sign, while Polly holds a clean, glowing configuration file.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and the round tan Nomnom creature cleaning up a digital garden. Nomnom is happily eating an old dusty wooden sign, while the bee hovers nearby holding a clean, glowing lime green (#ecf874) configuration blueprint. Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
